name: Colored Glass Tortoise Bath Canister - Threshold™
description:
Add functional and elegant style to your bath space with the Colored Glass Tortoise Bath Canister from Threshold™. Covered with tortoiseshell print, this bath canister is designed in a jar-like shape with a lid to help keep the contents neatly contained. Made of glass, it's great for helping organize your bath essentials.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
